label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The user wants to know if following these steps brings you back to the starting point. Let me break it down step by step. First, take 3 steps. Assuming I start facing a certain direction, say north. So after 3 steps north, I'm 3 units north of the start. Then, turn around. Turning around would reverse my direction. If I was facing north, turning around makes me face south. Now, take 5 steps. Moving 5 steps south from where I was after the first 3 steps. So net movement here is 5 steps south minus 3 steps north, which
